rawResponse.content:
{
  "text": "Insufficient data provided for analysis. Please provide chunk-level emotion analysis and computed metrics to generate actionable recommendations.",
  "reasoning": "The input data contains empty fields for averages, trends, friction index, peak moments, and chunk summaries. Without this information, it is not possible to assess viewer retention or emotional impact. To proceed, data collection is required.",
  "confidence": 0.1,
  "keyFindings": [
    "No emotion analysis data available",
    "Metrics summary is empty",
    "Chunk summaries are missing"
  ],
  "suggestions": [
    "Collect chunk-level emotion data including valence, arousal, and engagement scores",
    "Compute metrics such as average emotion scores, trends over time, friction index, and identify peak moments",
    "Analyze the start/hook for initial emotional impact",
    "Review pacing based on emotion transitions",
    "Identify key emotional beats for retention"
  ]
}
